page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn9gc.64xlarge is an x86_64 architecture bare-metal server instance powered by AMD EPYC 9A75 processors. It features 256 dedicated physical cores running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz with a single thread per core configuration. The system is equipped with 1536.0 GB of system memory, providing 6.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance integrates eight NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs, delivering a combined 576 GB of high-bandwidth video memory. It does not include local storage, requiring external network-attached storage solutions. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 380 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers between nodes.

Given the high-density GPU configuration and massive parallel compute capacity, this server is designed for intensive workloads such as large language model training, complex data science jobs, and distributed machine learning workloads. The lack of local storage is a tradeoff requiring robust network storage integration, but the high baseline network bandwidth mitigates potential data transfer bottlenecks. From a resource density perspective, the combination of dedicated AMD EPYC cores and Blackwell GPUs offers high qualitative cost efficiency for massive-scale parallel computing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn9gc.64xlarge is a high-performance bare-metal server designed for GPU-accelerated workloads. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it features 256 dedicated AMD EPYC 9A75 physical cores operating at 3.3 GHz, paired with 1536.0 GB of system memory. The instance is equipped with eight NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs providing a total of 576 GB of VRAM, making it highly suitable for large-scale machine learning, deep learning training, and complex data science computations. It does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage supported by a baseline network bandwidth of 380 Gbps. This high-throughput network interface ensures efficient data transfer for distributed computing environments. The server represents a dense, specialized hardware profile optimized for parallel processing and massive computational tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn9gc.64xlarge is a bare-metal server featuring 256 AMD EPYC cores, 1536 GB RAM, eight NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs with 576 GB VRAM, and 380 Gbps network bandwidth for massive parallel workloads.

tagline: A high-density GPU accelerated platform featuring eight Blackwell GPUs and 256 dedicated AMD EPYC cores for massive parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: 256 dedicated AMD EPYC 9A75 physical cores running at 3.3 GHz
Eight NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs with 576 GB of total VRAM
1536 GB of system memory providing 6.0 GB per core
380 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer

Optimized for large language model training and deep learning workloads
